definition: Consciousness as a nutriment that sustains continued name-and-form and unfolding experience.
notes: The project prefers consciousness nutriment because it is direct and fits the established fourfold pattern. Nutriment of consciousness is acceptable where the English line benefits from a less compressed phrase.

context_rules.context: In explanatory prose where a slightly expanded phrase reads more clearly

example_phrases.notes: The fourth of the four nutriments.
